opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The skin on his bottom looks completely raw and burned, and he screams in agony every time he pees.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: His nappy rash got raw and red fast after some diarrhoea and he's crying and not feeding well.

symptom_narrative.onset: ~3 days ago after loose stools from a tummy bug
symptom_narrative.character: raw, red, shiny/glazed rash on the nappy area
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: looks raw/burned; screams on weeing and nappy changes
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: his bottom, lower tummy and genitals
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the deep skin creases look spared; no spots spreading into the groin folds; feeding less over 12h due to pain; still some wet nappies

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: both parents present and anxious/exhausted; using fragranced commercial wipes

objective_data_offered.value: bright red shiny rash on the convex nappy areas, deep creases spared, no satellite spots, visible on video
feeding less in last 12h from pain; still having some wet nappies
